turns.query: Analyze the emission surge periods of Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd. and analyze their frequency patterns during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-13 00:00:00"

# 1) 定位企业（优先精确中文/英文名称，其次模糊匹配）
company_search = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n,
       string_agg(id::text || ':' || name, '; ' ORDER BY id) AS matches
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name IN ('Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd.', '天津铁厂有限公司')
   OR name ILIKE '%Tianjin Iron Works%'
   OR name LIKE '%天津铁厂%'
"""), engine)
print("企业匹配数量:", int(company_search.loc[0, "n"]))
print("企业匹配摘要:", company_search.loc[0, "matches"])

company_id_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT id, name
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name IN ('Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd.', '天津铁厂有限公司')
   OR name ILIKE '%Tianjin Iron Works%'
   OR name LIKE '%天津铁厂%'
ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN name = 'Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd.' THEN 0
    WHEN name = '天津铁厂有限公司' THEN 1
    ELSE 2
END, id
LIMIT 1
"""), engine)

if company_id_df.empty:
    raise ValueError("未找到 Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd./天津铁厂有限公司 的企业记录。")

target_company_id = int(company_id_df.loc[0, "id"])
target_company_name = company_id_df.loc[0, "name"]

# 2) 大表先按条件计数
cnt_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = :cid
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
"""), engine, params={"cid": target_company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
n_hours = int(cnt_df.loc[0, "n"])
print("有效小时记录数:", n_hours)

# 3) 数据库内完成均值、总体标准差、峰值及超过均值+1倍标准差的小时数；峰值若并列取最早小时
stats_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = :cid
      AND timestamp >= :start_ts
      AND timestamp < :end_ts
      AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
),
s AS (
    SELECT AVG(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS mean_v,
           STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS std_v,
           MAX(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS peak_v
    FROM base
),
p AS (
    SELECT b.timestamp AS peak_ts, b.exhaust_gas::float8 AS peak_v
    FROM base b
    CROSS JOIN s
    WHERE b.exhaust_gas = s.peak_v
    ORDER BY b.timestamp
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    s.peak_v AS peak_flue_gas,
    s.mean_v AS mean_flue_gas,
    s.std_v AS std_flue_gas,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.peak_ts - TIMESTAMP :start_ts))/3600 AS peak_offset_hours,
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.exhaust_gas > s.mean_v + s.std_v THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS surge_hours
FROM base b
CROSS JOIN s
CROSS JOIN p
GROUP BY s.peak_v, s.mean_v, s.std_v, p.peak_ts
"""), engine, params={"cid": target_company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

if stats_df.empty or n_hours == 0:
    raise ValueError("目标企业在指定时间窗口内无有效小时烟气量记录。")

peak_flue_gas = float(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_flue_gas"])
mean_flue_gas = float(stats_df.loc[0, "mean_flue_gas"])
std_flue_gas = float(stats_df.loc[0, "std_flue_gas"])
peak_flue_gas_offset_hours = int(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_offset_hours"])
surge_hours = int(stats_df.loc[0, "surge_hours"])

# 4) 频率模式：按日期与时段聚合，不输出原始逐小时记录
pattern_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = :cid
      AND timestamp >= :start_ts
      AND timestamp < :end_ts
      AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
),
s AS (
    SELECT AVG(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS mean_v,
           STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS std_v
    FROM base
),
flagged AS (
    SELECT timestamp,
           exhaust_gas,
           CASE WHEN exhaust_gas > s.mean_v + s.std_v THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_surge
    FROM base CROSS JOIN s
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_hours,
    SUM(is_surge)::int AS total_surge_hours,
    ROUND((SUM(is_surge)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) * 100), 2) AS surge_pct,
    jsonb_object_agg(day::text, day_surge_hours ORDER BY day) AS daily_surge_hours,
    jsonb_object_agg(period, period_surge_hours ORDER BY period) AS period_surge_hours
FROM (
    SELECT NULL::date AS day, NULL::text AS period, NULL::int AS day_surge_hours, NULL::int AS period_surge_hours
    WHERE false
) z
RIGHT JOIN (
    SELECT 1 AS k
) one ON true
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_n, SUM(is_surge)::int AS surge_n FROM flagged
) t
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT date(timestamp) AS day, SUM(is_surge)::int AS day_surge_hours
    FROM flagged GROUP BY date(timestamp)
) d
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT CASE
             WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN '00-05'
             WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 6 AND 11 THEN '06-11'
             WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 12 AND 17 THEN '12-17'
             ELSE '18-23'
           END AS period,
           SUM(is_surge)::int AS period_surge_hours
    FROM flagged
    GROUP BY 1
) hp
GROUP BY t.total_n, t.surge_n
"""), engine, params={"cid": target_company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

print("分析企业:", target_company_name)
print("峰值烟气量:", peak_flue_gas)
print("均值烟气量:", mean_flue_gas)
print("总体标准差:", std_flue_gas)
print("峰值距起点小时数:", peak_flue_gas_offset_hours)
print("排放突增小时数:", surge_hours)
print("频率模式汇总:", pattern_df.to_dict(orient="records")[0])

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-13 00:00:00"
target_company_id = 2564
target_company_name = "天津铁厂有限公司"

stats_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = :cid
      AND timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
      AND timestamp < CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
      AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
),
s AS (
    SELECT AVG(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS mean_v,
           STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS std_v,
           MAX(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS peak_v
    FROM base
),
p AS (
    SELECT b.timestamp AS peak_ts
    FROM base b CROSS JOIN s
    WHERE b.exhaust_gas = s.peak_v
    ORDER BY b.timestamp
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS valid_hours,
    s.peak_v AS peak_flue_gas,
    s.mean_v AS mean_flue_gas,
    s.std_v AS std_flue_gas,
    FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.peak_ts - CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)))/3600)::int AS peak_offset_hours,
    p.peak_ts AS peak_timestamp,
    (s.mean_v + s.std_v)::float8 AS surge_threshold,
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.exhaust_gas > s.mean_v + s.std_v THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS surge_hours
FROM base b CROSS JOIN s CROSS JOIN p
GROUP BY s.peak_v, s.mean_v, s.std_v, p.peak_ts
"""), engine, params={"cid": target_company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

pattern_daily = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = :cid
      AND timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
      AND timestamp < CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
      AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
),
s AS (SELECT AVG(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS mean_v, STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS std_v FROM base)
SELECT date(timestamp) AS day,
       COUNT(*)::int AS valid_hours,
       SUM(CASE WHEN exhaust_gas > s.mean_v + s.std_v THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS surge_hours,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN exhaust_gas > s.mean_v + s.std_v THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / COUNT(*) * 100), 2) AS surge_pct
FROM base CROSS JOIN s
GROUP BY date(timestamp)
ORDER BY day
"""), engine, params={"cid": target_company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

pattern_period = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = :cid
      AND timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
      AND timestamp < CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
      AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
),
s AS (SELECT AVG(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS mean_v, STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas)::float8 AS std_v FROM base),
f AS (
    SELECT CASE
             WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN '00-05'
             WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 6 AND 11 THEN '06-11'
             WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 12 AND 17 THEN '12-17'
             ELSE '18-23'
           END AS period,
           CASE WHEN exhaust_gas > s.mean_v + s.std_v THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_surge
    FROM base CROSS JOIN s
)
SELECT period,
       COUNT(*)::int AS valid_hours,
       SUM(is_surge)::int AS surge_hours,
       ROUND((SUM(is_surge)::numeric / COUNT(*) * 100), 2) AS surge_pct
FROM f
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period
"""), engine, params={"cid": target_company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

if stats_df.empty or int(stats_df.loc[0, "valid_hours"]) == 0:
    raise ValueError("指定时间窗口内无有效小时烟气量记录。")

peak_flue_gas = float(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_flue_gas"])
mean_flue_gas = float(stats_df.loc[0, "mean_flue_gas"])
std_flue_gas = float(stats_df.loc[0, "std_flue_gas"])
peak_flue_gas_offset_hours = int(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_offset_hours"])
surge_hours = int(stats_df.loc[0, "surge_hours"])

print("分析企业:", target_company_name)
print("有效小时数:", int(stats_df.loc[0, "valid_hours"]))
print("峰值烟气量:", peak_flue_gas)
print("峰值时间:", str(stats_df.loc[0, "peak_timestamp"]))
print("峰值距2025-06-10 00:00小时数:", peak_flue_gas_offset_hours)
print("均值烟气量:", mean_flue_gas)
print("总体标准差:", std_flue_gas)
print("突增判定阈值:", float(stats_df.loc[0, "surge_threshold"]))
print("突增小时数:", surge_hours)
print("日频率汇总:", pattern_daily.to_dict(orient="records"))
print("时段频率汇总:", pattern_period.to_dict(orient="records"))
